channel.title: LobangKing.sg — Singapore Lobangs
channel.description: Verified daily promos, freebies and discounts across Singapore.

item.title: LiHO TEA S’pore Buy 1 Get 1 FREE on Almost All Drinks Till 16 July 2026
item.description: Twice the bubble tea for the price of one

item.title: Starbucks New S’pore-exclusive beverage creations & locally inspired bites available this July 2026
item.description: Beloved local flavours, coffeehouse rituals and Singapore-inspired finds for the National Day season

item.title: Singapore Airlines Promo Offers Fares fr S$208 to Over 60 Destinations, Book from 14 Jul to 9 Aug 2026
item.description: Discover attractive airfares and bonus cardholder offers

item.title: McDonald’s Singapore 20% Off Chicken McCrispy® (6pc) Deal till 2 Aug 2026
item.description: Choose from Signature, Spicy or Mix

item.title: DBS & POSB Cardholders Enjoy S$50 Off Singapore Airlines Return Flights from 14-20 Jul 2026
item.description: Save instantly on eligible Singapore Airlines return fares when paying with an eligible DBS or POSB card.

item.title: Bank of China S’pore Up to 1.50% p.a. Time Deposit Promotion from 13 July 2026
item.description: Lock in a fixed return from just S$500 with promotional SGD time deposit rates via mobile banking

item.title: HECHÁ 1-for-1 Selected Drinks Every Mon & Tue Until 28 Jul 2026
item.description: Handcrafted tea favourites

item.title: Délifrance Singapore $6 Pies on Tuesdays until 29 Dec 2026
item.description: Golden, flaky savoury pies for $6 each

item.title: CHAGEE Orchard Gateway Offering 1-FOR-1 Fresh Milk Tea and Plushie Bundle from March 6–8 - Great Deals Singapore
item.description: CHAGEE Orchard Gateway Offering 1-FOR-1 Fresh Milk Tea and Plushie Bundle from March 6–8 Great Deals Singapore

item.title: Apple’s 2026 Student Deal starting soon: Apple readying free AirPods, Apple Pencil promotion this week - Macworld
item.description: Apple’s 2026 Student Deal starting soon: Apple readying free AirPods, Apple Pencil promotion this week Macworld

item.title: Starbucks Singapore Two Tall Drinks for S$9.90 Promotion (14-16 Jul, 2-8pm)
item.description: Starbucks Rewards members can enjoy two Tall drinks for S$9.90 during the offer timing

item.title: Starbucks S’pore Pink Bearista Glass Cold Cup Available from 13 Jul 2026
item.description: A charming pink Bearista collectible

item.title: Popeyes S’pore 1-for-1 2pc Love That Chicken Meal Midnight Crunch at $9.90 (13 to 17 July, 10pm – 2am)
item.description: Satisfy late-night cravings with two crispy chicken meals for the price of one.

item.title: Up to 55% off designer handbags, shoes & watches
item.description: Official Michael Kors sale with further reductions across designer handbags, shoes, watches and clothing — over 1,000 styles. Example: the Ava extra-small Saffiano crossbody is down from $430 to $189.

item.title: Designer leather bags on sale + free shipping
item.description: Coach Singapore's official leather bag sale — exclusive deals on handbags and signature styles, with free shipping for a limited time. New customers get 10% off their first order with code HELLO10.
